title: Declare narrow, explicit dependencies
description: List exactly the targets a rule needs in deps so the action graph is precise and incremental rebuilds stay small.
body: Use when adding a target or fixing missing-dependency errors. Do not depend on a broad umbrella target to pull in everything. Actions: add only the specific libraries the target compiles or links against; remove deps that are no longer used; let transitive deps come through the targets that own them. Validation signals include a small rebuild after a localized change and bazel query showing only intended edges. Risk boundary: an over-broad dependency forces large rebuilds and hides real coupling, so keep the graph tight and verify edges with query.
